default_vs_global.interpretation: Paired bootstrap over fixed retrieval queries. Supports retrieval relevance, not online game-win causality.

exact_vs_default.interpretation: Paired bootstrap over fixed retrieval queries. Supports retrieval relevance, not online game-win causality.

track_c_auxiliary.interpretation: Auxiliary all-seat Track C switch. Useful as trend evidence only; it is not target-seat causal A/B.

runtime_feedback.source: PostgreSQL knowledge_usage_feedback / strategy_knowledge_docs current non-fake snapshot
runtime_feedback.filter: excludes games whose players.model_name contains fake
runtime_feedback.interpretation: Current non-fake PostgreSQL snapshot. This is usage feedback, not causal score lift.

source.filter: excludes games whose players.model_name contains fake

claim_boundary.observed: 当前非 fake DB 快照中，strategy-used 决策的 Track B 均值高于 unused 决策，且均值差置信区间不跨 0。
claim_boundary.not_supported: 这是观测性关联，仍可能受到检索更常出现在较容易或较晚决策中的混杂影响；不能写成随机因果估计。
claim_boundary.required_for_causality: 需要 target-seat paired A/B：固定 seed、对手和角色分配，并且只为目标席位开启 Track C。

formal_health.interpretation: Formal real-LLM health and separability evidence; not Track C final causal proof.

claim_boundaries.claim: 默认检索策略相对 global_only 有统计支持的检索指标提升
claim_boundaries.boundary: 仅证明离线检索相关性和覆盖率，不证明最终胜率因果提升。

claim_boundaries.claim: Track C 开关提升最终胜率
claim_boundaries.boundary: 辅助 all-seat 数据 CI 跨 0，且不是 target-seat paired A/B。

claim_boundaries.claim: 运行时策略反馈显示策略被大量使用且 helpful/used 较高
claim_boundaries.boundary: helpful 不是随机对照因果分数，不能替代 Track B 差分或 target-seat A/B。

claim_boundaries.claim: 使用策略的决策与更高 Track B 逐步评分相关
claim_boundaries.boundary: 观测性联表统计，不能替代 target-seat 随机/配对因果实验。
